title: The UK will legalize plug-in solar on August 27 - Engadget
summary: At the start of the year, the UK pledged to legalize plug-in solar panels to help households cut a little from their energy bills. Earlier this month, the UK government published an interim specification for domestic plug-in solar setups.
caption: output/2026-07-21/the-uk-will-legalize-plug-in-solar-on-august-27-engadget.txt
